titleStmt.title: SII 27.171: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 171. (A.R. No. 539 of 1929-30.) BAINDŪR, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the outer prākāra of Śayanēśvara temple.

This is dated Śaka 1445, Chitrabhānu, Māgha śu. 5 corresponding to 1523 A.D., January 22, the Śaka year being current. The details cannot, however, be verified. In the earlier portion in Sanskrit the date is referred to by the chronogram Tavabhaṭa, which according to the Kaṭapāyādi system would work out to 1446 of the Śaka era, the cyclic year being Svabhānu, corresponding to 1523-24 A.D.

The record states that at the time of the inscription Dēvarasaoḍeya, was governing Baidūr and other rājyas from his capital Saṅgitapura and registers a gift of land, after purchase, for worship and offerings in the temple of Gōpīnātha and for the daily feeding of Brāhmaṇas in the maṭha by Saṅkaṇa-sēnabōva, son of Nāraṇa-sēnabōva, in the name of the latter and for the merit of the former. The temple and the maṭha were both constructed by the donor. The earlier portion in Sanskrit gives the genealogy of the donor whose grandfather was Mahābala and the great-grandfather Maṅkīprabhu. The second date given in the record probably refers to the date of its engraving. Baindūr is also referred to as Bindupura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .This line is
śrīmānujvalahaivadēśa tilakō bābhāti baṁkiprabhurmānyaḥ kāśyapagōtrabhākṣbhu vibhavō viprōttemō viśśrutaḥ . tadgōtrējani sadguṇōti ca
turō dakṣaḥ sudharmāṁbudhiḥ . sphūtāṁśēti mahā mahābali Iti kṣōṇī surāgrēsaraḥ . nārāyaṇākhyōsya babhūva sūnuḥ kulābja bhā
nurbudha kāmadhēnuḥ . Amātya mukhyōnuta sādhusakhyaścaritra śuddhō jagati prasiddhaḥ . tatputraḥ śśaṁkarākhyaḥ śubhaguṇa nilayōdhīta sadvē
da śāstraḥ sanmaṁtrī maṁtravēttā ruciramihamaṭhaṁ biṁdupuryyaṁ racayya . kṛtōsminnanvahaṁ dvādaśa dharaṇī surōbhyannadānaṁ svabhānau gōpīnātha pra
tiṣṭhāṁ tavabhaṭa gaṇitē śākavarṣē vitēnē . śrī madrājādhirāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa kruṣṇarāyara rājyābhyudayadalli śrī manmahā
maṁḍalēśvara saṁgirāyavōḍeyaravara kumāra dēvarasavoḍeyaru saṁgītapuravara rājadhāniyalliddu saddharmakathāprasaṁgadiṁbaidūru
muṁtāda samastarājavanū pratipālisutaṁ viddaṁdina śālivāhana śakavarṣa 1445 neya citrabhānu saṁvatsarada māgha śu 5 lu śrīmatu nāra
ṇa sēnabōvaramaga saṁkaṇa sēnabōvaru barasida dharmaśāsanada bhāṣākramaveṁteṁdare saṁkaṇa sēnabōvaru baidūranāḍa nakaraha
laru samasta kayyali hiraṇyōdaka dhārāpūrvvakavāgi mūlavaneṟasikoṁḍu Āḷutaṁviddha mallarasana kaḷige gaḍi mūḍalu kuraṇeya
lu gaḍi teṁkalu hariva voḷegaḍi paḍuvalu besukūra brāhmaragaḍiyalli naṭṭa kallu gaḍi baḍagalu hariva hoḷegaḍi Iṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁ
doḷaguḷa kaḷiyanu Artthavanikki Āgaragadde teṁgina hittilanu geyisi rūpumāḍisi Ā sarvvasvakke kaṭṭikoṁḍa paṁga sēnēśvara dēvara
Amrutapaḍige kaṁcina hā 40 lkedali Akkimu 9 kaṁcaladēvige kaṁcina ha 40 lkedalu Akkimu 6 Ubhayaṁ mu 15 A
kki yi kaṁcina mu 15 Akkiya paṁgavallade Akara Anāya kāṇike khaḍḍāya bīḍige birāḍa muṁtāda Āvavu pottara
villaveṁdu nāḍu nakarada madhyasthanalli kaṭṭanū sthiti karisikoṁḍu bāḷuttaṁviddu saṁkaṇasēnabōvaru tamage dharmavāga bē
keṁdu taṁma taṁdegaḷu nāraṇasēnabōvara hesaralli naḍasuva brāhmaṇa bhōjanakke sēnēśvara dēvara baḍagadikkina nāra
siṁhadēvara Eḍada bhāgadalliya maneṭhāvige Artthaparicchēdavāgi koṭṭu mūla paricchēda hiraṇyōdaka dhārā
pūrvvakavāgi teṟu beḍige yillade sarvvamānyavāgi mūlavakoṁḍu catussīme voḷagāgi pogaravanu kaṭṭisi ṭhāvinalli maṭha
vanu kaṭṭisi taṁma yiṣṭadaivavāda gōpīnātha dēvaru muṁtāda dēvapūjegaḷanu pratiṣṭisi Ā maṭhada pūjeya mā
ḍuva Aḍigaḷu dēvarige naivēdyavanu samarppisi Alli Uṁḍigeyanu biḍisi Ā Aḍigaḷu sahapratidi haṁneraḍu maṁdi
Annasatravanu naḍasi baharu yī śāsanāṁkitavāda haṁneraḍu maṁdiya Aṁnasatrakke varuṣa 1 kke kaṁcina
ha 40 neya lkedalū Akkimu 86 ha 16 sarvvasvakke kaṭṭida paṁgala prati Akki mu 15 Ubhayaṁ paṁga sa
ha dharmmakke biṭṭa Akki mu 101 ha 16 Akṣaradalū nūṟoṁdu mūḍeyu hadināṟu hāne Akkiyanu kā
laṁ pratiyalū saṁkaṇasēnabōvaru Avara saṁtati paraṁpareyāgi naḍasi mēlāda Anubhava
nū Ā saṁkaṇasēnabōvaru Avarasaṁtatiyavaru brahmasvavāgi badiki baharu yeṁdu dēvarasavoḍe
yara nirūpadiṁda baidūra halaru samastaru Ubhayadalli saṁkaṇasēna bōvarū barasida dharmaśāsana yiṁtsu
dakke sākṣigaḷu Āditya caṁdrāvanilōnalauca dyaurbhūmirāpō hrudayaṁ yamaśca . Ahaśca rātriśca U
bhēca saṁdhyē dharmmaśca jānāti narasya Urattaṁ . karttaravoppa gōpinātha dēvaru svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harica
vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭivarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . yī dēvasvabrahmasvavanu Ārobaru Atikra
misidare vāraṇāsiyalli taṁmatāyi taṁdegaḷanū sahasra kapilegaḷanū koṁda pātakakke hōharu yī dēva
svabrahmasvada dharmmavanū Aḷidanyāyavanārobbaru māḍidare baidūranāḍu nakarada halaru samastaru Ā hā
ne Uraddhiyanū nōḍi pratipālisutta baharu Eṁdu barasida dharmmaśāsana śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.171 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
